meta.source: CC0 2D Douche Cyborg (Jump, Run, Shoot, Idle) — 'CyborgMark'
meta.attribution: CC0 2D Douche Cyborg by Darius Guerrero — https://opengameart.org/content/cc0-2d-douche-cyborg-jump-run-shoot-idle (CC0 1.0)
meta.notes: Upstream per-frame PNGs (~114-139 px wide canvases) were cropped to a fixed global union bounding rect across all animations and box-filter downscaled into 72x96 cells (see tools/build-newchar-sprites.cjs). The 'attack' strip is the pack's Shoot animation (the cyborg fires its arm-cannon) — fitting the Samus-inspired zoner's projectile identity.
